name: Rhossili Down & Worm's Head
highlights: Iconic Gower headland, tidal Worm's Head serpent.
points_of_interest: Wreck of the Helvetia; Bronze Age burial chambers on the Down
viewpoints: Rhossili Bay (voted UK's best beach); Worm's Head
water_features: Sea; tidal lagoon on the Worm
picnic_spots: Above Rhossili Beach; behind Old Rectory
food_drink_nearby: The Bay Bistro & Coffee House; Worm's Head Hotel
hazards_notes: Worm only accessible 2.5 hrs either side of low tide
